export type LRUCache<TKey, TValue> = { get: (key: TKey) => TValue | undefined set: (key: TKey, value: TValue) => void clear: () => void } export function createLRUCache<TKey, TValue>( max: number, ): LRUCache<TKey, TValue> { type Node = { prev?: Node; next?: Node; key: TKey; value: TValue } const cache = new Map<TKey, Node>() let oldest: Node | undefined let newest: Node | undefined const touch = (entry: Node) => { if (!entry.next) return if (!entry.prev) { entry.next.prev = undefined oldest = entry.next entry.next = undefined if (newest) { entry.prev = newest newest.next = entry } } else { entry.prev.next = entry.next entry.next.prev = entry.prev entry.next = undefined if (newest) { newest.next = entry entry.prev = newest } } newest = entry } return { get(key) { const entry = cache.get(key) if (!entry) return undefined touch(entry) return entry.value }, set(key, value) { if (cache.size >= max && oldest) { const toDelete = oldest cache.delete(toDelete.key) if (toDelete.next) { oldest = toDelete.next toDelete.next.prev = undefined } if (toDelete === newest) { newest = undefined } } const existing = cache.get(key) if (existing) { existing.value = value touch(existing) } else { const entry: Node = { key, value, prev: newest } if (newest) newest.next = entry newest = entry if (!oldest) oldest = entry cache.set(key, entry) } }, clear() { cache.clear() oldest = undefined newest = undefined }, } }
